hero.sub: Explore our exclusive collections of certified diamonds, pure 22K gold, and premium South Sea pearls, meticulously handcrafted for life's most precious moments.

testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.t1: The diamond necklace from Mymy is simply breathtaking. The quality and sparkle are an absolute 5 stars!
testimonials.t2: I purchased my bridal set and the workmanship is exceptional. The intricate detailing and shine make it truly special.
testimonials.t3: Mymy's pearl collection is exquisite. The pieces are all elegance and beauty. I'm a lifelong fan!

footer.tagline: Crafting timeless elegance through exquisitely crafted gemstone jewelry, a trusted industry partner. A tradition built on the foundation of purity, quality and unmatched artisanship.
footer.shopTagline: Crafting future heirlooms with ethical materials and ancestral techniques.

shop.title: The Core Collection
shop.description: Sculptural forms and timeless materials. Each piece is hand-finished in our atelier to ensure a lifetime of wear.
shop.noItemsSub: Adjust the filters to explore more pieces.
shop.ringsDesc: Signature bands and sculpted silhouettes crafted to become forever pieces.
shop.necklacesDesc: Layered pendants and statement chokers designed to frame every occasion.
shop.earringsDesc: Refined drops and luminous studs balancing softness with brilliance.
shop.braceletsDesc: Modern cuffs and diamond bracelets finished with heirloom-level detail.

product.reviewsEmpty: Our community's reviews will appear here soon.
product.careP1: Store your piece in the provided velvet pouch or jewelry box to prevent scratching and oxidation.
product.careP2: Avoid contact with perfumes, lotions, and household chemicals. Remove before swimming or bathing.
product.careP3: Clean gently with a soft, lint-free cloth after wear. For deeper cleaning, use a mild soap solution with a soft brush, rinse thoroughly, and pat dry.
product.careP4: For professional cleaning and maintenance, we recommend visiting an authorized jeweler once a year.
